translations.name: 锻造铁剑
translations.description: 使用铁锭和木材锻造一把铁剑。

translations.name: Forge Iron Sword
translations.description: Forge an iron sword using iron ingots and wood.

translations.name: 酿造治疗药水
translations.description: 将草药和水混合制成治疗药水。

translations.name: Brew Healing Potion
translations.description: Mix herbs and water to brew a healing potion.
